creator: tim@ppp18344.on.bellglobal.com
text:
>
>        bsd.man.mk can't handle man pages with ":"s, since it uses
>        the ":T:S" constructs to extract elements.

Still more followup: OpenBSD has fixed this in usr.bin/make/parse.c.
Unfortunately, I just reviewed their fix more closely and was rather
repulsed by the code that was written.  Nonetheless, the fix is correct in
(intended, if not actual) functionality.
